description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style sofa with a high, ornately curved backrest featuring deep button tufting and a decorative crest at the center. The upholstery is a rich, dark gray fabric that covers the entire frame, including the rolled armrests and the back. The seat is adorned with six loose, light-colored cushions of varying sizes, providing both comfort and visual contrast. The wooden frame is visible along the base and legs, showcasing intricate carving and a classic, slightly weathered finish. The sofa stands on four cabriole legs, each with a gentle outward curve, enhancing its traditional aesthetic. This piece exudes sophistication and would be a striking addition to upscale urban environments such as boutique hotel lobbies, stylish cafes, or residential patios.
description: A vintage-style, dark gray tufted sofa with ornate wood detailing, rolled armrests, and six light-colored loose cushions. The high, curved back and cabriole legs give it a classic, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tufted backrest, ornate crest, rolled armrests, and all six loose cushions arranged on the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the rolled armrest profile, and the layered arrangement of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, curved backrest with visible wood trim and tufting, with only the tops of the cushions peeking over.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest profile and cushion arrangement from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose, light-colored cushions of varied sizes are placed along the seat and back, with a mix of rectangular and square shapes, providing a layered, inviting look.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled armrests at each end, padded and upholstered in the same dark gray fabric as the body, rising slightly above the seat and curving outward in a classic, traditional style.
attribute_leg_design: Four exposed, carved wooden cabriole legs positioned at each corner, featuring a gentle outward curve and a decorative, vintage finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and deeply curved backrest with button tufting and a central ornate crest, providing a dramatic and elegant silhouette.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with visible button tufting on the backrest, creating a quilted, textured appearance; the seat and armrests are smooth, while the cushions are plain and unpatterned.
